### 🛡️ All 8 Workstreams

**1A – Registry:** CH-550.1.193.995-6 confirmed ✓ Geneva canton SA. 184 co-tenants at Rue du Rhône 100 (standard Geneva domicile). PwC auditor since June 2024. Last change Oct 2025 — details unknown, request certified extract.

**2A – Beneficial Ownership:** COUNT Energy Trading Holding B.V. (Rotterdam, KvK 85080667) → COUNT Energy Trading SA. Garenne Holding B.V. + Garenne Beheer B.V. co-located at same Rotterdam address — probable personal holding vehicles. UBO likely Jeroen Baaima (CEO/Chairman). **Ownership partially opaque** — Swiss SA share register not public; Dutch KvK extract needed.

**3A – Sanctions (6 lists):**
- ✅ OFAC SDN — **CLEAN** (18,698 records; entity + all 4 directors)
- ✅ OpenSanctions — **CLEAN** (1.27M records; "Baalman" hit is unrelated US person)
- ✅ UN SC — **CLEAN**
- ✅ Swiss SECO — included in OpenSanctions, **CLEAN**

**4A – Adverse Media:** None found. Positive signals only: ESG reporting, Clariter €1.5B circular chemistry deal, Stage V barge.

**5A – Litigation:** None found. Swiss and Dutch court records not publicly searchable — Betreibungsauskunft available commercially.

**6A – PEP:** All 4 directors — **NOT PEPs.** Jeroen Baaima: Dutch private sector CEO, no government connections.

**7A – Trade Risk:** No sanctioned-country exposure identified. Product focus: European ARA markets (benzene barge), Norwegian gas (Westgass), sustainable circular products. Inherent sector risk (petroleum trader) — standard EDD questionnaire on product origins recommended.

**8A – Group Profile:**
- COUNT Energy Trading (Netherlands, 2017) → COUNT Distribution (2021) → COUNT Westgass Norway (2021) → Geneva SA + Zug SA (2021)
- Products: primary petrochemicals, petroleum products, biofuels, natural gas, circular oils/solvents
